today_in_history_posts.title: Jets (Was: `OP_FOLD`: A Looping Construct For Bitcoin SCRIPT)
today_in_history_posts.summary:
- A discussion on implementing jets in Bitcoin outlines three possibilities.
- Possibility A involves upgrading nodes without consensus change for performance benefits.
- Possibility B and C suggest soft forks for lighter transaction weighting and jet registration.

today_in_history_posts.title: Code for sub second runtime of piecewise linarization to quickly approximate the minimum convex cost flow problem (makes fast multi part payments with large amounts possible)
today_in_history_posts.summary:
- The Lightning Network improves payment flows with a quick min cost flow approximation method.
- The solution involves piecewise linearization, optimizing multi part payment splits and planning.
- This approach, now computationally competitive, benefits LSPs in planning multiple payments efficiently.

today_in_history_posts.title: Deflationary money is a Good Thing
today_in_history_posts.summary:
- Passive investments involve acquiring assets without significant management, like storing cash or land.
- Active investments require direct engagement, such as developing land or managing rental properties.
- The blog suggests central banks could stabilize economies using inflationary currencies backed by deflationary ones like Bitcoin.
